infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: TerraSignal uses the camera so you can capture crop images directly in the field.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: CropOpt needs microphone access so you can speak with the agronomist about your scan results.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: TerraSignal uses your photo library so you can attach crop images for offline diagnosis.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: TerraSignal can save annotated crop scan images when you export field evidence.

plugins.cameraPermission: TerraSignal uses the camera so you can capture crop images directly in the field.

plugins.photosPermission: TerraSignal uses your photo library so you can attach crop images for offline diagnosis.

plugins.microphonePermission: CropOpt needs microphone access so you can speak with the agronomist about your scan results.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: TerraSignal uses your location to show nearby disease outbreaks on the community map.
